title: micranthemum orbiculatum var. emarginatum
intro: Micranthemum orbiculatum var. emarginatum, also known as the small-flowered dwarf dill or dwarf dill, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Micranthemum orbiculatum var. emarginatum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
